prompt_text: Hyperrealistic. Multiple beagle dogs. Four legs each, floppy ears, tricolor fur (white, brown, black patches). Natural canine anatomy. Various ages and sizes. Alert, curious expressions. Group of beagles stands in position beneath bright lights, focused and still. One controlled, fluid movement at full intensity. The motion feels natural and powerful. Locked medium frame, side angle. Warm amber stadium floodlights, celebratory energy. The action completes cleanly. The environment reacts naturally. Cold breath vapor visible on each exhale. Cinematic, no text overlays. Natural eye-level perspective.

planner_outputs.raw_text: Snap zoom locks on athlete's eyes to compress the entire world to a single point of will, dark amber stadium light swallowing every surrounding distraction — only the face and its locked resolve exist in the frame.
Aggressive handheld push-in through bright warm floodlights at full power, jersey fabric and arm loaded in foreground.
Backlit silhouette catches rim light in cold bright clinical light — camera holds at peak action moment as the release point becomes impossible to look away from.
Wide reveal in warm celebration light — the stadium scale asserts itself beyond the athlete and the throw.
to compress the entire world to a single point of will
as the body commits toward an action that cannot be recalled
to place the moment against the full magnitude of its stage
cold breath vapor visible on each exhale. jersey fabric moves with body momentum in the cold air. teammates collide with full-force celebration contact.
Backlit silhouette catches rim light — color and texture flood in from edge to center —
